response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in project development, but lacks explicit experience in IT consulting, UML architecture modeling, and German language proficiency (only basic), which are critical for this role. His remote U.S.-based background and limited exposure to European client environments raise questions about cultural and regulatory alignment.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack leadership across diverse tech stacks and domains
Strong mentorship and workshop experience demonstrating communication and knowledge sharing
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No explicit evidence of UML modeling or IT architecture design for client systems
Lack of experience in IT consulting or compliance/risk management in regulated environments
